tasks.question: The book was so __________ that I finished it in one day. (INTEREST)
She spoke very __________ during the interview and answered all the questions well. (CONFIDENT)
We were surprised by his __________ to help strangers. (KIND)
Tom felt __________ after working for twelve hours without a break. (EXHAUST)
The teacher explained the grammar rule very __________. (CLEAR)
It was __________ to leave the door open when nobody was home. (CARE)
The city has changed a lot because of rapid __________. (DEVELOP)
Her performance was absolutely __________ and everyone applauded loudly. (AMAZE)
My little brother is very __________ and asks questions all the time. (CREATE)
The museum guide gave us some very __________ information. (USE)
Jack’s answer was completely __________ and didn’t match the question. (LOGIC)
We need to find a __________ solution to this problem quickly. (PRACTICE)
The children behaved __________ while their parents were away. (good)
He made an __________ decision and later regretted it. (RESPONSIBLE)
Sarah looked at me __________ when she heard the news. (ANGRY)
It is __________ to sell rare flowers. (LEGAL)
He passed the exam with __________ results. (IMPRESS)
